title: canarium rugosum
intro: Canarium rugosum, also known as the Bursera or Canarium tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its bark, leaves, and seeds, which contain a range of bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Canarium rugosum include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Canarium rugosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments.
